title: alnus × hybrida var. viridior
intro: Alnus × hybrida var. viridior, also known as a hybrid of green alder, is a plant species that belongs to the Betulaceae family, specifically a hybrid between the green alder (Alnus viridis) and the grey alder (Alnus incana). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful for treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Alnus × hybrida var. viridior include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
